_note: Hardcoded placeholder steps for UI testing only. Replace with real excel-imports/epic-quests.json data.

steps.name: Soulfire
steps.description: Obtain the Ghoulbane sword as a precursor. Spawn Lord Nagafen in Nagafen's Lair and loot Ghoulbane from him, or alternatively purchase one from the bazaar.

steps.name: Words of Bidding
steps.description: Speak with Irak Altil in East Freeport. He will send you on a series of tasks to recover the words that unlock the next stage of your epic.

steps.name: Head of the Valiant
steps.description: You must first obtain the Head of the Valiant. Adventurers in the Plane of Sky can find this on the island drake encounters.

steps.name: Speak with Vual Stoutest
steps.description: Take the Head of the Valiant to Vual Stoutest in North Qeynos. He will examine it and provide the next step in the quest chain.
